project_area: Basic (fundamental) research in biology, physics, and chemistry or at the disciplinary boundaries between these fields
demographic_requirements: All principal and co-investigators must be either United States citizens or lawful permanent residents by the LOI deadline. Investigators must hold full-time tenure, tenure-track appointment, or independent research faculty appointment with evidence of an independent research program.
eligibility_summary: At least two investigators must be identified on the research project, with one serving as the Principal Investigator (PI) at a Pennsylvania institution of higher education. The PI's institution must be the lead institution. The proposed research must be a new initiative, not currently funded from other sources, and must be curiosity-driven, addressing fundamental processes with potential application for the betterment of humankind. The research must integrate multiple approaches and involve interdisciplinary collaboration.
